items._note: EAST landing wall (encloses the primary suite from the landing/stair); one door = primary-bedroom entry (into the SOUTH primary room), in the walkable landing zone north of the stair.
Walk-in (NORTH) / primary bedroom (SOUTH) divider (z=6); primary is the larger, south room next to the en-suite. Door primary->walk-in.
Primary <-> en-suite (extension) separator at x=-12; door from the primary bedroom into the en-suite.
WEST landing wall (encloses the west wing); 3 doors (SW bed, bath, NW bed), all north of the stair void, opening into their rooms.
SW bedroom / bath divider (z=3.5, clears the middle west window at z=2.08).
Bath / NW bedroom divider (z=8.0, clears the north west window at z=10.75).
PRIMARY BEDROOM king (SOUTH room): headboard on the east wall (x=-12), facing the entry door; clear of the en-suite door, south windows, and the walk-in divider.
items.head: E

items._note: SW BEDROOM queen: headboard on the west (exterior) wall, north of the west window; faces the landing door.
items.head: W

items._note: NW BEDROOM queen: headboard on the south divider (z=8.0); faces north; clear of windows.
items.head: S

items._note: WEST BATH (shallow, z 3.5..8.0): shower at the far-west end, vanity + toilet along the north wall.
PRIMARY EN-SUITE (extension x -22.92..-12, z -11.92..4): vanity on the north wall, shower SW, toilet on the separator wall.
